summary: The diff implements most requirements well: a Motoko backend with job listings, a React frontend with four pages, navigation, footer, hero section, job cards with filters, about/contact pages, and a cohesive visual theme. However, the footer copyright year is dynamically generated rather than the hard-coded '2026' required by constraints. The backend lacks a dedicated filter query function. Edit and remove admin functions are not visible. Generated image files are not confirmed in the diff. NITs/IISERs are absent from seed data.

missing_requirements.requirement: Footer text must read exactly '© 2026 ProfessorConnect. All rights reserved.' with the literal year 2026, not dynamically generated
missing_requirements.reason: Footer.tsx uses new Date().getFullYear() which currently outputs 2025, not the hard-coded 2026 required by the constraint

missing_requirements.requirement: Filter function accepting optional parameters for institute, department, location, and position type as a backend query function
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows getAllJobs and addJob but no filterJobs backend query function with optional parameters is visible; filtering is done entirely client-side

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin functions to edit and remove job listings must be callable
missing_requirements.reason: The visible backend code and useQueries.ts only show addJob; editJob and removeJob functions are not present in the diff

missing_requirements.requirement: At least 10 realistic sample listings from diverse Indian institutes including NITs and IISERs
missing_requirements.reason: All 10 seed jobs are from only IIT Bombay, IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, and IISc — no NITs or IISERs are represented
No image file is added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff; the file is referenced in Navigation.tsx but not confirmed as added
No image file is added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff; the file is referenced in Home.tsx but not confirmed as added

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters added to the footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any caffeine.ai branding, attribution, or UTM tracking in the footer

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity and AuthClient provider and authentication hooks integrated into the app
hallucinated_features.reason: User login and Internet Identity integration is explicitly listed as a non-goal for this phase, yet InternetIdentityProvider wraps the entire app and useInternetIdentity hook is fully implemented

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode CSS variables and theme defined in index.css
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a navy/dark blue, white, and dark gray palette but does not request dark mode support
